creator: thiagohero501@gmail.com
text:
The currently [port]games/prboom[port] depends of [games/doom-data] to run.But the port [port]games/doom-data[port] include non-free software as the doom shareware.

Fix: I have fixed the Makefile to build and run without the need of [port]games/doom-data[port].And i have done a port of freedoom that has no need of [port]games/doom-data[port],so i have declared my new port [port]games/freedoom[port] as a dependency to run prboom.So now we have a 100% free port of prboom and freedoom.

Patch attached with submission follows:
